title: Chitrakoot Falls

overview.short: The Chitrakote Falls (also spelled Chitrakote, Chitrakot, and Chitrakoot) is a natural waterfall on the Indravati River, located approximately 38 kilometres (24 mi) to the west of
overview.description: The Chitrakote Falls (also spelled Chitrakote, Chitrakot, and Chitrakoot) is a natural waterfall on the Indravati River, located approximately 38 kilometres (24 mi) to the west of Jagdalpur, in Bastar district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. The height of the falls is about 29 metres (95 ft). It is the widest waterfall in India, reaching a width of nearly 300 metres (980 ft) during the peak monsoon season. Because of its width and horseshoe shape during the monsoon season, it is often called the "Niagara Falls of India".

topPlaces.name: Narayanpal Temple
topPlaces.description: The Narayanpal Temple is a historic Hindu temple located near the confluence of the Indravati and Narangi rivers in the Bastar district of Chhattisgarh, India. It is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu, the protector of the universe in Hindu mythology.

items.note: The Narayanpal Temple is a historic Hindu temple located near the confluence of the Indravati and Narangi rivers in the Bastar district of Chhattisgarh, India. It is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu, the protector of the universe in Hindu mythology.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chitrakoot Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chitrakoot Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chitrakoot Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (220 km) and the nearest railway station is Raipur Junction (227 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chitrakoot Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chitrakoot Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chitrakoot Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Chitrakoot Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chitrakoot Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Narayanpal Temple.
